name: Release Automation

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 1,15 * *' # Bi-monthly schedule
  workflow_dispatch:
  # push: # Commented out on push logic

jobs:
  release-automation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Private Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          # Ensuring we fetch history for tagging
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate Ephemeral Token
        id: app-token
        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
        with:
          app-id: ${{ vars.APP_ID }}
          private-key: ${{ secrets.PRIVATE_KEY }}

      - name: Set Version Logic
        run: |
          # Preferred YY.MM.DD format
          echo "VERSION=$(date +'%y.%m.%d')" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "COMMITTEE_MSG=Automated Release - Stable Build" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Flattening and Logic Preservation
        run: |
          # Check for single wrapper folder and move contents to root app/assets
          if [ -d "app/assets" ]; then
            cd app/assets
            if [ $(ls -1 | wc -l) -eq 1 ] && [ -d */ ]; then
              mv */* .
              rmdir */
            fi
            cd ../..
          fi

      - name: Commit & Push Changes
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
        run: |
          git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config --global user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          
          git add .
          # Logic Preservation: Only commit if changes exist
          git commit -m "${{ env.COMMITTEE_MSG }} v${{ env.VERSION }}" || echo "No changes to commit"
          
          # Tag Force-Delete & Re-push logic for the ∞ tag
          git tag -d ∞ || true
          git push https://x-access-token:${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git :refs/tags/∞ || true
          git tag ∞
          git push https://x-access-token:${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git main --tags --force

      - name: Deploy to Public Repository
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
        run: |
          # Since you deploy from the public repo, push the cleaned root to hassanbiswas.github.io
          # Use the --force flag to keep the public repo synced with your private source logic
          git push https://x-access-token:${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}@github.com/hassanbiswas/hassanbiswas.github.io.git main:main --force

      - name: Display Release Information
        run: |
          echo "------------------------------------------------"
          echo "Committee Message: ${{ env.COMMITTEE_MSG }}"
          echo "Data Attribute (Version): ${{ env.VERSION }}"
          echo "Status: Complete"
          echo "------------------------------------------------"
